title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by navigating to Settings, selecting Security, and clicking on the Reset Password option. A reset link will be sent to their registered email.

title: Account Creation
content: New users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage and filling in their name, email address, and password.

title: Update Profile
content: Users can update their profile information such as name, profile picture, and contact details from the Profile Settings page.

title: Delete Account
content: Users who wish to delete their account can do so by going to Account Settings and selecting the Delete Account option. This action is permanent.

title: Contact Support
content: If users experience issues, they can contact customer support through the Help Center or by emailing support@example.com.

title: Change Email
content: Users can change their registered email address by visiting Account Settings and selecting Change Email.

title: Two Factor Authentication
content: Two factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. Users can enable it from Security Settings and verify their phone number.
